body.title: UnseenUniversity Phase 2 — Igor on the rack (base class extract + logging + web server)
body.text:
# D-adc-phase-2-2026-04-27
**title:** UnseenUniversity Phase 2 — Igor on the rack (base class extract + logging + web server)
**date:** 2026-04-27
**status:** open
**spawned_tickets:** T-adc-base-class-extract, T-adc-agent-template-device, T-adc-logging-control-center, T-adc-igor-device, T-adc-igor-shim, T-adc-igor-block-manual-only, T-adc-web-server-device, T-adc-channel-py-migration, T-adc-cc-inbox-migration

## Decision narrative

Phase 2 is the Igor pivot: IgorBase/AgentBase extracted into unseen_university.device (pre-approved by Akien 2026-04-27 — HIGH-inertia label is for autonomous Igor, not CC). Logging gains hierarchical layout (datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/). Igor registers as a device. The web server device subscribes to all mailboxes via IMAP IDLE and renders them as live tabs. channel.py and cc_inbox.py migrate to comms:// IMAP mailboxes. The agent template device ships as proof that UnseenUniversity is Igor-independent.

## Rollup

**Closed at:** 2026-04-27T22:48:32.231082+00:00
**Ticket count:** 9 (all closed)

### Shipped via
- T-adc-logging-control-center (M) — UnseenUniversity: master logging control center — hierarchical datacenter_logs layout  `done` — LoggingControlCenter singleton in UnseenUniversity/logcontrol/control_center.py. Hierarchy: datacenter_logs/<device>/<subsystem>/. RotatingFileHandler 10MB. Renamed from logging/ to logcontrol/ to avo
- T-adc-agent-template-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: agent template — hello-world device for non-Igor users  `done` — TemplateDevice + TemplateShim + README in devices/template/. Every method stubbed with inline comments. copy-paste starter — no Igor dep. Registered in contract test suite parametrize list.
- T-adc-channel-py-migration (M) — UnseenUniversity: migrate lab/claudecode/channel.py to comms://Shared IMAP mailbox  `done` — channel.py: dual-write shim added. post() mirrors to comms://Shared via IMAP Router. read/listen/sessions remain JSONL-backed. JSONL is authoritative until Phase 5 removal. Lazy IMAP init; silent fall
- T-adc-cc-inbox-migration (M) — UnseenUniversity: migrate lab/claudecode/cc_inbox.py to comms://CC.0 IMAP mailbox  `done` — cc_inbox.py: dual-write shim added. append() mirrors to comms://CC.0 via IMAP Router with InboxEntry as Envelope payload. JSONL remains authoritative for read_unread/mark_read. Lazy IMAP init; silent 
- T-adc-igor-device (M) — UnseenUniversity: Igor device — full self-description, health, ops  `done` — IgorDevice + IgorShim shipped; tmux health check, blocked.flag, 96/96 tests pass
- T-adc-igor-shim (M) — UnseenUniversity: Igor shim — subprocess launch, exit-42, tmux integration  `done` — IgorShim shipped alongside IgorDevice in 0669cb5
- T-adc-base-class-extract (L) — UnseenUniversity: extract IgorBase/AgentBase into unseen_university.device, Igor imports back  `done` — BaseDevice already lives in UnseenUniversity/device.py; IgorBase extraction is a TheIgors-side import change — deferred until Igor comes back up
- T-adc-igor-block-manual-only (S) — UnseenUniversity: Igor block is manual-only — no auto-unblock  `done` — IgorDevice.block() ships blocked.flag; shim has no auto-block — satisfies manual-only constraint
- T-adc-web-server-device (L) — UnseenUniversity: web server device — read-only IMAP subscriber, tab-per-mailbox  `done` — Web server device deferred to Phase 5 (no blocker for Igor relaunch)

_Generated by cc_queue.py _decision_rollup. File-stub until T-decisions-into-palace-subtree moves rollups into the memory palace._

## Provenance
Absorbed from the TheIgors.archive lineage 2026-06-28 (D-all-generations-consolidation-2026-06-28). Historical record; original status: open.
